heading: Zoning laws and ordinances; establishment; assistance; restrictions; variances
label: 410eeee–4 Zoning laws and ordinances; establishment; assistance; restrictions; variances
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to .section 460m–18 of this title

children.text: have the effect of restricting incompatible commercial and industrial use of all real property in or adjacent to the Gorge area;

aid in preserving the character of the Gorge area by appropriate restrictions on the use of real property in the vicinity, including, but not limited to, restrictions upon building and construction of all types; signs and billboards; the burning of cover; cutting of timber; removal of topsoil, sand, or gravel; dumping, storage, or piling of refuse; or any other use which would detract from the esthetic character of the Gorge area; and

have the effect of providing that the Secretary shall receive advance notice of any hearing for the purpose of granting a variance and any variance granted under, and of any exception made to, the application of such law or ordinance.
